reason: Raw review was syntactically valid but not closeout eligible because parsed_review.blocks_goal_closeout=true despite P0/P1/P2=0 and blocks_pack_closeout=false.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-646 is a descriptor-only RP21 Admin Console domain/service-bridge pack (150 units, risk C, range RP21.P01.M08.S06-RP21.P02.M07.S06) extending CP00-645. Independent read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) confirms the pack-level production_ready candidate ("admin_console_domain_service_bridge_descriptor_verified") is supported and appropriately scoped: it is a descriptor-verification claim with manifest runtime_ready:false, not a runtime-ready claim. (1) Live queue: plan live_state.next_subphase RP21.P01.M08.S06 matches CP00-646's first unit; range/unit_count/risk match the plan with deviation_from_plan:false. (2) Boundaries: all runtime/write flags are false across registry.js/service.js/validators.js, the contract JSON, and the manifest (writes_product_state, executes_*_runtime, evaluates_runtime_permission, writes_permission_decision, emits/persists_audit_event, create/update/delete DB rows, read/write object storage, opens_ui_runtime, exposes_blocked_claim_detail, persists_idempotency_key, persists_workflow_attempt, acquires_runtime_lock, leak_detected, permission_bypass_detected). validateAdminConsoleCp646DomainServiceBridgeDescriptor enforces these false-flags; admin src has no filesystem writes; rp21:admin-console:validate runs without --write (non-mutating). (3) No real data: no_real_data/synthetic_only true, raw_payload_included false throughout. (4) Authority: claude_is_final_approver false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval false (validator-enforced), human_final_approval_required true, runtime_opened false. (5) Hermes: runtime_receipt_emitted false, hermes_runtime_opened false — deterministic evidence packets only, not product runtime. (6) Review-evidence integrity (CP178+ hardening): auth preflight passed (exit 0, valid JSON, 1449B stdout), prompt_size_ok, prompt_contains_full_diff_or_source false, source_inspection_mode read_tools_used, summary_only correctly prohibited, forbidden_tools_present false, active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted empty, no pre-baked raw-output/receipt. (7) Validation: all 21 recorded commands exit 0 (node --check set, rp21 validators, npm test, npm run validate, weighted/spec/fullplan/goal:closeout/rp00 control-plane validate, build, git diff --check); model.test.js asserts descriptor-only boundaries and exact on-disk contract == generated projection. Pre-review closeout artifacts (manifest in_progress/production_ready false, construction-inspection PENDING_REVIEW, adjudication pending, claude-review-result pending_review) correctly avoid premature promotion. No P0/P1/P2 issues found; two non-blocking P3 documentation/bookkeeping observations. Pack closeout not blocked; goal/enterprise-trust closeout remains blocked pending human final approval (Claude is read-only reviewer, not final approver).

findings.title: changed-file-scope.json classifies pack-active paths as both implementation and unrelated
findings.details: docs/closeout-packs/cp00-646/ and docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md appear in both untracked_implementation_files (lines 162-163) and unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (lines 168-169). The cp00-646 evidence directory is pack-active (correctly enumerated under active_pack_required_untracked_files), so labeling it 'unrelated' is contradictory bookkeeping. This is cosmetic and does not affect review scope: the practical hardening gate active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted is empty, so no active implementation file was excluded from review.
findings.recommendation: Make the scope buckets mutually exclusive — the cp00-646 evidence dir (and the pack-relevant handoff doc) should be classified as pack-active, not also as unrelated_dirty_files_preserved. Non-blocking.

findings.title: Baseline/prompt validation_commands list includes a non-RP21 program validator
findings.details: The generic validation_commands list (and the prompt) includes 'npm run rp05:matter-core:validate', which belongs to RP05 Matter Core and is not part of this RP21 pack's executed matrix. command-evidence.json instead records the RP21-appropriate validators (rp21:admin-console:validate, rp21:validate) plus all umbrella gates (closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack/weighted/spec/fullplan/goal:closeout/rp00 control-plane validate, npm test, npm run validate, git diff --check), all exit 0. Gate coverage for CP00-646 is therefore satisfied; the rp05 entry is a generic-template artifact, not a missing gate.
findings.recommendation: Treat as informational; optionally tailor the per-pack prompt command list to the active program to avoid confusion. Non-blocking — does not affect the production_ready determination.
